setup.context: A light show with colored spotlights

root.narration: You are programming a light show! The lights follow a pattern: Red, Blue, Red, Blue, Red, Blue... The show plays 3 rounds of this pattern, and each round has 6 lights. Someone erased part of the code, and now you can only see: Red, Blue, Red, Blue, ___, ___. What are the missing two lights?

choices.text: Red, Blue -- the pattern keeps repeating Red then Blue.
Blue, Red -- it flips at the end.
Green, Yellow -- new colors at the end.

outcome.headline: Pattern Master! Red, Blue Repeats!
outcome.explanation: You recognized the pattern! The code repeats 'Red, Blue' over and over. Pattern recognition is a superpower in coding. Once you spot a pattern, you can write a simple loop: 'repeat 3 times: show Red, show Blue.' Instead of writing 6 instructions, you write 2 inside a loop! Programmers always look for patterns to make code simpler.
outcome.whatToRemember: Look for patterns in code and data. When something repeats, you can use a loop to make it simpler!

keyTerms.definition: Noticing when something repeats or follows a rule. Helps programmers write shorter, smarter code.

outcome.headline: Close, But Patterns Do Not Flip!
outcome.explanation: You got the right colors but in the wrong order! The pattern is always Red THEN Blue, over and over. It does not flip at the end. When reading a pattern, watch the exact order carefully. Red-Blue-Red-Blue means the next pair is also Red-Blue, not Blue-Red.
outcome.whatToRemember: Patterns repeat exactly. Pay attention to the exact order -- it stays the same every time!

outcome.headline: Where Did Green and Yellow Come From?
outcome.explanation: There are no green or yellow lights anywhere in the pattern! The whole sequence only uses Red and Blue. A pattern means the SAME thing repeats. It does not suddenly introduce new things at the end. Look at what you already have and keep it going the same way.
outcome.whatToRemember: A pattern repeats what already exists. It does not introduce new elements. Look at what you have and continue it!
